description_long: This electric drill features a robust, ergonomic design with a predominantly orange and gray plastic casing. The handle is integrated into the main body, providing a comfortable grip for extended use. The front section houses a metallic chuck, which currently holds a cylindrical drill bit, and a visible power cord extends from the rear. Ventilation slots are present on the back of the casing, likely to prevent overheating during operation. The trigger button is clearly visible on the handle, allowing for easy activation. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for various urban repair or construction tasks.
description: A sturdy orange and gray electric drill with a visible power cord, metallic chuck, and ergonomic handle, featuring ventilation slots and a trigger button.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic chuck with a cylindrical drill bit and the tip of the power cord.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the orange and gray casing, ergonomic handle, and the trigger button on the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ventilation slots on the orange casing and the handle's back profile.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the power cord attachment and the full length of the drill body.
